things.name: Stanley Park
things.description: 1,001-acre temperate rainforest peninsula with the seawall, totem poles and Prospect Point

things.name: Capilano Suspension Bridge
things.description: 137-metre swinging bridge over the Capilano River with Treetops Adventure walkways

things.name: Granville Island Public Market
things.description: Vibrant covered market on a former industrial island with fresh food, crafts and street performers

things.name: Whistler Mountain Resort
things.description: World-class ski resort 2 hours north, with year-round activities including the Peak 2 Peak Gondola

things.name: Museum of Anthropology at UBC
things.description: Outstanding collection of Northwest Coast First Nations art and culture in a stunning building

things.name: Gastown
things.description: Vancouver's oldest neighbourhood with cobblestone streets, the Steam Clock and boutique shops

things.name: Vancouver Aquarium
things.description: Canada's largest aquarium in Stanley Park with beluga whales, dolphins and Pacific marine life

things.name: Grouse Mountain
things.description: The Peak of Vancouver — gondola rides, skiing, zip-lining and grizzly bear refuge

things.name: Vancouver Art Gallery
things.description: Major gallery in the former provincial courthouse with BC artist Emily Carr and international works

things.name: Chinatown
things.description: One of North America's oldest Chinatowns with the Dr. Sun Yat-Sen Classical Chinese Garden
